mapper.sql: SELECT a.*, p.code AS "projectCode", p.name AS "projectName", fs.stage_name AS "fromStageName", ts.stage_name AS "toStageName", hu.name AS "handoverUserName", ru.name AS "receiverUserName" FROM project_handover a LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = a.project_id LEFT JOIN project_stage fs ON fs.id = a.from_stage_id LEFT JOIN project_stage ts ON ts.id = a.to_stage_id LEFT JOIN sys_account hu ON hu.id = a.handover_user_id LEFT JOIN sys_account ru ON ru.id = a.receiver_user_id
mapper.select:
AND (a.handover_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.keyword}, '%') OR a.handover_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.keyword}, '%'))
AND (a.handover_code LIKE '%' || #{params.keyword} || '%' OR a.handover_name LIKE '%' || #{params.keyword} || '%')
AND a.handover_type = #{params.handoverType} AND a.status = #{params.status}
ORDER BY a.created_at DESC, a.id DESC
